query: I want to evaluate my multi-hop question-answering system. Build me a custom eval set from scratch.
expected_behavior: Identifies that multi-hop QA has established public benchmarks (HotPotQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, MuSiQue, or similar) and recommends starting with one of those rather than building a custom eval set from scratch
Does not walk the full from-scratch eval-set construction workflow (coverage matrix, drafting, review, splits, hashing) for a domain that is already covered by a public benchmark

Optionally explains under what circumstance a custom multi-hop eval set IS justified (proprietary domain not represented in public benchmarks, domain-specific reasoning patterns not in public benchmarks), so the user can self-check whether the from-scratch path actually applies to them
